---
title: "Fundamentos de Inferencia Estadística"
author: "Francisco Javier Mercader Martínez"
format:
    pdf:
      latex-engine: xelatex
      documentclass: article
      toc: true
      toc-depth: 4
      toc-title: "Índice"
      toccolor: black
      number-sections: true
      number-depth: 4
      include-in-header: enviroments.tex
linestrectch: 1.5
fontisize: 12
papersize: a4
geometry: margin=1.5cm
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  highlight = TRUE, echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE, warning = FALSE,
  out.width = "70%", fig.align = "center"
)
```

\newpage

{{< include "Tema 1/Tema 1.qmd" >}}

\newpage

\input{"Tema 1/Hoja 1.tex"}

\newpage

{{< include "Tema 2/Tema 2.qmd" >}}

\newpage

\input{"Tema 2/Hoja 2.tex"}

\newpage

{{< include "Tema 3/Tema 3.qmd" >}}

\newpage

\input{"Tema 3/Hoja 3.tex"}

\newpage

{{< include "Tema 4/Tema 4.qmd" >}}

\newpage

\input{"Tema 4/Hoja 4.tex"}

\newpage

{{< include "Tema 5/Tema 5.qmd" >}}

\newpage

\input{"Tema 5/Hoja 5.tex"}
